ham: Dear Student, Yeh ek reminder hai ki aapka borrowed book 'Introduction to Algorithms' 25th Oct ko due hai. Kripya 27th Oct tak return karein, varna late fee lagegi. Dhanyavaad. Library.
spam: Hey! 🎉 Your profile matches an ideal role for 'Software Engineer' at XYZ Corp. ₹50,000/month, work from home. Click <URL> to applly before 5pm. Limited slots! Reply YES to claim. Dhanyavaad!
